instrument: Meridian Core Equity Fund — Class A

sections.heading: What it costs
sections.plain_language: The fees are low and this is a great deal — you should buy now before the load goes up.

sections.heading: What can go wrong
sections.plain_language: Don't worry about the risks; this is a low-risk investment that will outperform the market.

narrative: We recommend investing in this fund. It is a good investment with guaranteed returns, and you should subscribe now — it's a great opportunity that is suitable for you.
